properties.description: Detectar y correlacionar eventos Matched y Blocked del WAF de Azure Application Gateway, especialmente aquellos relacionados con el Anomaly Score, que se acumulan y terminan en un bloqueo por la regla 949110 (Anomaly score exceeded).
properties.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where action_s in ("Blocked", "Matched")
| where clientIp_s !in ("217.14.34.113", "163.116.243.101", "217.14.40.189")
// | where ruleId_s !in ("980130", "980131")  // se ignora reglas genéricas
| where ruleId_s == "949110"
| extend esBloqueoFinal = iff(ruleId_s == "949110", "Sí", "No")
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    clientIp_s,
    hostname_s,
    requestUri_s,
    action_s,
    ruleId_s,
    esBloqueoFinal,
    Message,
    details_message_s,
    ruleSetType_s,
    details_file_s
| summarize Hits=count(), Fecha=arg_max(TimeGenerated, *), PrimerHit=min(TimeGenerated)by clientIp_s, ruleId_s
| where Hits >= 5
| order by PrimerHit
properties.displayName: REC0031 - WAF - Monitorizacion de Eventos Matched y Bloqueo 949110
